macro.title: Housing market is poised for growth in 2026 if Iran conflict doesn’t raise rates
macro.what: 2026 demand data is positive, but Iran-driven energy costs, 15% tariffs, and Fed hawks could push mortgage rates above 6.25%.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: February’s CPI report reveals steady annual inflation of 2.4%
macro.what: Inflation rose 0.3% in February and stayed at 2.4% year over year, with shelter costs up 0.2% and rents posting the smallest gain since 2021.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Back on the Market: Relistings Jump as Home Sellers Bet on Stronger Spring Market
macro.what: Nearly 45,000 sellers who delisted their homes last year relisted them in January—the highest January number in records dating back a decade
macro.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
macro.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: What real estate agents need to know about the spring housing market
housing.what: Experts say the challenge for real estate and mortgage professionals is interpreting signals without overreacting to short-term fluctuations.

housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: PHH Mortgage is rebranding as Onity Mortgage
housing.what: Onity Group will rebrand PHH Mortgage as Onity Mortgage in March 2026, unifying its servicing and originations platform under a single brand.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Midwest housing markets surge as demand absorbs homes faster than new listings
housing.what: Housing demand is accelerating as buyers absorb homes faster than new listings
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Minimum home lot sizes eyed in Colorado push to break barriers

housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Unison’s home equity investment faces another legal battle in California
housing.what: A class-action lawsuit alleges Unison HEI contracts are hidden reverse mortgages, citing a $97,256 payout that grew to nearly $375,000.
